mapper.sql: select r.relation_id, r.channel_id, p.provider_name, c.channel_name, r.model_version_id, v.model_id, m.model_name, v.version_name, v.api_model_name, r.remote_model_name, r.enabled, r.price_ratio, r.priority, r.weight, r.max_qps, r.remark, r.create_by, r.create_time, r.update_by, r.update_time from ai_c_channel_model_relation r left join ai_c_provider_channel c on c.channel_id = r.channel_id left join ai_c_provider p on p.provider_id = c.provider_id left join ai_c_model_version v on v.version_id = r.model_version_id left join ai_c_model m on m.model_id = v.model_id
mapper.insert: insert into ai_c_channel_model_relation (channel_id, model_version_id, remote_model_name, enabled, price_ratio, priority, weight, max_qps, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{channelId}, #{modelVersionId}, #{remoteModelName}, #{enabled}, #{priceRatio}, #{priority}, #{weight}, #{maxQps}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, sysdate())
mapper.update: update ai_c_channel_model_relation set channel_id = #{channelId}, model_version_id = #{modelVersionId}, remote_model_name = #{remoteModelName}, enabled = #{enabled}, price_ratio = #{priceRatio}, priority = #{priority}, weight = #{weight}, max_qps = #{maxQps}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = sysdate() where relation_id = #{relationId}
mapper.delete:
delete from ai_c_channel_model_relation where relation_id in
#{relationId}
